message:
Authenticate Homebrew audit

Pass the workflow token to Homebrew so online cask audits use authenticated GitHub API requests and avoid the low unauthenticated rate limit.

Assisted-by: GPT-5.5 (pi)

files.patch:
@@ -10,6 +10,8 @@ on:
 jobs:
   audit:
     runs-on: macos-15
+    env:
+      HOMEBREW_GITHUB_API_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }}
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@08c6903cd8c0fde910a37f88322edcfb5dd907a8  # v5.0.0
       - name: Tap local checkout
